title: Rouge Blight Sculk (Greyscale)
description: Makes Sculk and related items and particles greyscale. (Yes, the Title is a pun)
body: "Well, I was looking through some sculk texture packs and saw one that was black and white. It was cool and definitely added to the spook level (like the deep dark wasn't scary enough), but it wasn't all that I was hoping for. I moved on, but the Idea just stuck to me like glue. so, I made my own. Here's the result!" This texture pack makes the sculk, Disk 5, The echo shard, recovery compass, and related particles greyscaled. If you have Optifine, there are emissive textures, and Ancient City related blocks have Deep Dark variants.
